name: /risk-classify: for a minimal-risk use case, obligations list is empty (Title III chapter 2 does not apply)
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case spam-filter --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" && grep "^classification: minimal" compliance/risk-classification.yaml 1>&2 && ! grep -E "^  - " compliance/risk-classification.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
